name: White Turnip Soup
recipeInstructions:
Info: from The Old Farmer's Almanac Colonial Cookbook
Parsley
Peel, slice and coarsely chop the vegetables. Cook them slowly in butter for 5 minutes.
Add 6 cups boiling water, salt, and pepper, and bread (previously dried out and crumbled). Simmer the soup for half an hour.
Puree the mixture. Reheat gently over low heat.
Stir in beaten egg yolks mixed with cream. Serve immediately, garnished with finely minced parsley.
